list.vod_content: The film chronicles the adventures of Dzanielle, a renowned influencer, following her humorous attempts to gather one million followers. After dealing with several fake friends among the â€œBlack card-swiping, Ozempic-sharting, workout-addicted Upper East S

list.vod_blurb: How much is contained in these two words-irritation, tenderness, laughter, love. And a little shame,
list.vod_content: How much is contained in these two words-irritation, tenderness, laughter, love. And a little shame, when she knows everything about you. Even what you yourself have forgotten. This film is about all mothers and for all of us.

list.vod_blurb: Explores the ups and downs of modern romance.
list.vod_content: Explores the ups and downs of modern romance.

list.vod_blurb: Matt's fiance leaves him at the altar. Heartbroken, he goes on their planned Italian honey
list.vod_content: Matt's fiance leaves him at the altar. Heartbroken, he goes on their planned Italian honeymoon alone. There he rediscovers his zest for life, food, and meets Gia who helps him find love again.
